Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client with their associated details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Client). This represents who created/owns the client record.

companyName.description: The name of the client's company.

contactName.description: The name of the primary contact person at the client's company.

contactEmail.description: The email address of the primary contact person.

contactPhone.description: The phone number of the primary contact person.

address.description: The physical address of the client's company.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the client's address.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the client's address.

consumptionData.description: Data related to the client's consumption patterns or history (e.g., JSON string).

clientType.description: The type of client, used for bonus calculations.

onboardingStatus.description: An array of objects representing the client's onboarding journey.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Proposal entity.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Proposal). This represents who created the proposal.

title.description: The title of the sales proposal.

content.description: The main content or description of the proposal (e.g., JSON string).

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the proposal was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the proposal was last updated.

SalesMaterial.title: SalesMaterial
SalesMaterial.description: Represents a sales material document or link.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalesMaterial entity.

title.description: The title of the sales material.

url.description: The URL or path to the sales material.

description.description: A brief description of the sales material.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Commission entity.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Commission). This represents who is receiving the commission.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the commission was recorded.

UserProfile.title: User
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

team.description: The sales team the user belongs to.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

onboardingCompleted.description: Flag to indicate if the user has completed the onboarding process.

Counter.title: Counter
Counter.description: Represents a counter for generating sequential IDs.

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores client details. Includes client's core information.

/clients/{clientId}/proposals/{proposalI.description: Stores sales proposals related to a specific client.

/sales_materials/{salesMaterialId}.description: Stores sales material documents and links.

/sales/{userId}.description: Stores sales user profiles. Accessible only to the authenticated user.

/counters/{counterId}.description: Stores counters for sequential ID generation.
